rationale: Both papers are tightly aligned on sales-force compensation using field experiments, and the cited study provides core prior evidence on incentive-plan effects (quota bonuses vs gifts) that the 2021 paper explicitly positions itself against when arguing a gap beyond sales-based incentives. Given this thematic and methodological overlap, the citation is plausibly a substantive benchmark/foundation rather than an incidental mention, despite only DOI-level match evidence.
